item.title: Windows Remote Management

item.title: Windows Deployer
item.author: mail@christianmahnke.de (Christian Mahnke)
item.description:
How to install a freshly built software from GitLab / GitHub?
On a Windows computer.
In an internal network - behind a VPN gateway
